rationale: Both W8.1 (1h, DSR=0.0069) and W8.2 (5m, DSR=0.3075) are in the 0.50 <= DSR < 0.95 EXTEND branch per plan §8.5; the headline dsr_3fold=0.0069 from the 1h backtest is the more conservative of the two. Per the documented decision rule, EXTEND means: 3 more walk-forward folds + revisit cost model, then re-evaluate. The W8.3 honest report (reports/w8_honest_report.md) explicitly states 'W8.5 will EXTEND per the documented decision rule.' Data is synthetic (W0 BTC-only fallback) with zero edge by construction; the EXTEND branch is the correct interpretation under plan §4 pre-mortem scenario 3 and per the W8.3 honest report's explicit guidance.
next_steps: Run 3 additional walk-forward folds on real or synthetic data
Re-visit cost model (current CAS is negative on synthetic)
Re-evaluate W8.5 fork after the additional folds
If still EXTEND or HALT after 3 more folds, surface to user per W8.5 acceptance criterion
